name: qa-playwright-portfolio
description: Professional QA Automation Portfolio using Playwright and TypeScript

scripts.test:api: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const {existsSync}=require('fs'); const paths=[process.platform==='win32'?'.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe':'.venv/bin/python', process.platform==='win32'?'python.exe':'python', 'python3']; const python=paths.find((candidate)=>candidate.includes('.venv')?existsSync(candidate):true); if(!python){console.error('No Python interpreter found.'); process.exit(1);} const result=spawnSync(python,['-m','pytest','tests/api'],{stdio:'inherit', shell:false}); if(result.error){console.error(result.error.message); process.exit(1);} process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"

author: QA Portfolio
